title: Public metrics dashboard (clears, quarantine reasons, cache hit-rate)
context: The project commits to transparency: cleared-item count, quarantine reasons, cache hit-rate, policy-compliance, and downstream-delivery metrics must be publicly visible. A lightweight dashboard surfaces these metrics so external observers can verify the gate's conservatism and the engine's politeness. Unscheduled backlog; a small transparency surface for public accountability.
objective: Build a public metrics dashboard (static site or embedded report) displaying key engine metrics including cleared-item count, provenance completeness, quarantine-reason breakdown, cache hit-rate, policy-compliance status, downstream lanes wired, and downstream artifacts delivered, refreshed on each pipeline run.
output: A public metrics dashboard (static site or embedded report) committed via PR, refreshed by the pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: The dashboard displays: cleared-item count, provenance completeness (%), quarantine reasons by count, cache hit-rate, zero-policy-breach status, downstream lanes count, and downstream artifacts delivered.
Metrics are refreshed automatically on each pipeline run.
The dashboard is publicly accessible without authentication.
Data backing the dashboard is derived from committed artifacts (ledger, manifests), not ephemeral runtime state.
pnpm build and pnpm test and pnpm lint pass.
